headline: Stop gaining, establish your deficit today
summary: You're losing 0.03 kg/week instead of 0.62 kg/week needed—the gap is catastrophic. Today establishes the discipline before Friday's snacking pattern hits.
details: Eat only pre-portioned Huel meals today and stay below 8000 kJ; emotional snacking is sabotaging your entire plan and weekend is your known weakness. Do 45 minutes on the rowing machine today to create a deficit and prove you can execute. Today determines whether you spiral into another gaining week or break the pattern—you've lost 0.4 kg in 30 days when you need 2.5 kg per month; act like your goal matters.
